description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a clean, rectangular layout and a mix of large and small windows distributed across its facades. The front includes a double garage, a paved driveway, and a small landscaped garden with shrubs and trees. The main entrance is centrally located, flanked by windows and a prominent front door, while the rear of the house opens to a private backyard with additional greenery. The exterior walls are finished in a muted gray tone, complemented by white window frames and doors. The roof is flat and appears to be constructed from concrete or a similar material, with no visible overhangs or decorative elements. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, kitchen, and bedroom spaces, and the property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, gray exterior, large windows, double garage, and landscaped front and back yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, driveway, and landscaped garden with shrubs and trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, large windows, and the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_2: Side view with visible patio doors, backyard access, and additional windows along the facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, the side entrance, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all facades
